text.text: 📉 *Dip detected — zero sessions for 11+ consecutive days; open ticket DEV-879 still tracking*

*Signals*
• *What:* 0 sessions on 2026-07-01 (yesterday); 0 sessions on 2026-06-24 (same weekday last week). Zero traffic across all dates — both dates are below the 30-session anomaly floor, so no new threshold is triggered. The Top Pages and Referral Sources tabs returned no data rows.
  *So what:* The GA4 blackout first detected on 2026-06-20 continues into day 11. Either the site has zero organic reach, the GA4 tag is silently failing, or the property configuration changed.
  *Now what:* No new action — open ticket <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-879|DEV-879> is tracking this issue.

*Open Ticket*
• <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-879/growth-pulse-2026-06-23-zero-traffic-day-3-complete-ga4-blackout|DEV-879>: [Growth Pulse] 2026-06-23 — Zero-traffic day 3: complete GA4 blackout continues (existing — still open)

elements.text: Compared against same weekday last week. GA4 data may lag 24–48h.
